Tests for alarm layout, attribute handling, calendar events, reminders, timeline layouts, models, peek events, and resources in Pebble firmware, plus a build script.


## Files
- **[test_alarm_layout.c](test_alarm_layout.c.md)**: Tests the alarm layout subtitle generation from attributes in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_attribute.c](test_attribute.c.md)**: Tests for attribute serialization, deserialization, and manipulation in the Pebble firmware timeline service.
- **[test_calendar.c](test_calendar.c.md)**: Tests for calendar event handling in the Pebble firmware, including initialization, event addition, and timer management.
- **[test_reminders.c](test_reminders.c.md)**: Tests for the reminder functionality in the Pebble firmware timeline service, including timer and snooze logic.
- **[test_timeline_layouts.c](test_timeline_layouts.c.md)**: Tests for timeline layout rendering in the Pebble firmware, including setup, teardown, and helper functions.
- **[test_timeline_model.c](test_timeline_model.c.md)**: Tests for the timeline model in the Pebble firmware, including initialization, iteration, and deletion.
- **[test_timeline_peek_event.c](test_timeline_peek_event.c.md)**: Tests for timeline peek event functionality in the Pebble firmware, including event lifecycle and concurrency.
- **[test_timeline_resources.c](test_timeline_resources.c.md)**: Tests for timeline resource management functions in the Pebble firmware, including validation and retrieval of resource IDs.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing various firmware components and services in the Pebble timeline.
